MOTION Notice Of Motion For Apportionment Proceeding Anad For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds and Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Carolin Shining, Esq. for Petitioner: Karen Lewis, present as Guardian at litem for: Carrie Ann Lewis and Hannah Lewis, minor Claimants, Darren Lewis is also present in court, Denise Wolleben not present.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court having reviewed the moving papers, hears testimony and considered evidence presented, grants the Order Distributing Settlement Funds.
Order signed in open court.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each minor as follows:
Attorney's Fees $5,864.36
Costs $947.75
A net balance of $17,593.09 to be depositted into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, 115 Center St., Manteca, CA.
Orders signed in open court.
